frontmatter.description: I really enjoyed our time in Munich, its a very cool city with a lot to offer, I'm going to miss the transit a lot and the beautiful weather in the city as well.
frontmatter.title: Final Week in Germany And Abroad

frontmatter.description: The Eisbach is an offshoot of the Isar river that's been controlled to have a constant flow and a standing wave, this makes it perfect conditions for surfers.
frontmatter.title: Second and Third Weeks in Germany

frontmatter.description: Going into my final year at school has made me think a lot about what I wish I had known going into college.
frontmatter.title: First Week in Germany and Some Reflection

frontmatter.description: Happy to announce that I've accepted a full time offer to join Drift in Boston starting in 2020!
frontmatter.title: Joining Drift
